creator: gavin.atkinson@ury.york.ac.uk
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/internal/statistic.html contains only dead
links or links to very out-of-date (2004) stats.  Remove the link to it on
http://www.freebsd.org/internal/ until the page itself is either updated
(it sounds like the web stats won't be updated any time soon) or deleted.
Note that the Japanese web build links to the English statistic.html page,
so that needs to be corrected before the page itself is deleted.
